title: T-043 — SET-003 First Location step (ltree path + zone + bin, S-U3)
prompt:
# T-043 — SET-003 First Location step (ltree path + zone + bin, S-U3)

## Goal
SET-003 onboarding first-location step production component (onboarding-flow parity).

Canonical Settings prototype source of truth is `design/Monopilot Design System/settings/*.jsx`. For onboarding, DO NOT use org-screens/data-screens as 1:1 source. Use `design/Monopilot Design System/settings/onboarding-screens.jsx:7-238` as the canonical onboarding flow prototype and implement only current step `first_location` / SET-003 location fields. Reuse shared Settings shell/design tokens where applicable, but onboarding parity must preserve the wizard stepper, saved-state/resume semantics, skippable redirect cards, and completion pattern from `onboarding-screens.jsx`. Production contract: data via Server Components (Drizzle); mutations via Server Actions; primitives from `packages/ui` only.

## Files in scope
- apps/web/app/onboarding/location/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/onboarding/location/page.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria (all must hold)
- Given the production onboarding step renders, when compared to `design/Monopilot Design System/settings/onboarding-screens.jsx:7-238` for current step `first_location` / SET-003 location fields, then it follows the onboarding wizard structure and interactions: stepper, labels, state transitions, skip/back/continue behavior, loading/error states and focus order. Org/data screens may be reused only for individual field styling, not as the 1:1 onboarding source.
- Given the user enters a 4-level path, when submitted, then locations row is created with level=4, path materialized correctly, and the wizard advances.
- Given the path string contains an invalid separator, when validated, then the form shows 'Use ` › ` between segments' inline.

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: write RTL test that mounts the page with mocked data and asserts the parity AC items + ac_extra coverage.
- GREEN: build component, wire Server Action(s).
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/onboarding/location/page.test.tsx [create]` and `pnpm typecheck`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not import @radix-ui/react-dialog outside packages/ui (§0 ESLint rule).
- Do not paste prototype JSX wholesale — translate to production contract.
- Do not regress accessibility (axe violations = fail).
- Do not treat org-screens.jsx or data-screens.jsx as canonical 1:1 onboarding screens; onboarding-screens.jsx owns the flow.
